channel.title: TACO | Trump Always Chickens Out
channel.description: A live-data daily tracker of market pressure, financial stress, and TACO-style retreat conditions.

item.title: 2026-04-16 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 12.79
item.description: Daily pressure check for 2026-04-16: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 12.79/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. A positive 5-session S&P move also added equity relief. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
